node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Labels, targets, rewards & preferences is modeled as depending on Statistics & experimental design, Game theory & decision theory and feeding downstream nodes such as Supervised learning, Semi-supervised & weak supervision, Reinforcement learning.

limitations: Encoding choices can discard information, amplify bias, or make important invariances difficult to learn. Its direct dependencies include Statistics & experimental design, Game theory & decision theory.
